2606.01293.title: ResNet-34 with Lightweight Decoder for Accurate and Efficient Segmentation of Fetal Brain MRI
2606.01293.paper_summary: Accurate segmentation of fetal brain tissues in Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is critical for early diagnosis of congenital abnormalities and improving prenatal care. However, the task remains difficult because of fetal motion, low tissue contrast, and major anatomical variability throughout gestational ages, particularly in segmenting complex structures such as white matter, gray matter, lateral ventricles, deep gray matter, extra-cerebrospinal fluid, cerebellum, and brainstem. As a solution to these difficulties, this research introduces a novel deep learning model that combines a ResNet-34 encoder with a lightweight decoder leveraging multi-layer perceptron (MLP) modules for adaptive feature refinement. This design specifically enhances the model's ability to preserve anatomical boundaries and mitigate segmentation errors caused by motion artifacts and intensity inhomogeneities. Computational efficiency is achieved by reducing parameter count, employing bilinear upsampling instead of transposed convolutions, and optimizing the decoder for speed without sacrificing accuracy. Trained and validated on the FeTA 2021 dataset using 5-fold cross-validation, the proposed model outperforms baseline architectures such as UNet, UNet++, DeepLabV3, and DeepLabV3+, achieving an average Accuracy of 97.37% with a mean Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) of 90.33%, mean Intersection over Union (IoU) of 86.93%, and Precision of 90.83%. Additionally, its fast inference time and reduced computational load make it well-suited for integration into real-time clinical workflows.
2606.01293.paper_summary_zh: 準確的胎兒大腦組織分割在磁共振成像 (MRI) 中對於早期診斷先天性異常和改善產前護理至關重要。<lb/>然而，由於胎兒運動、組織對比度低以及妊娠期間主要解剖變異性，這項任務仍然困難，特別是在分割複雜結構如白質、灰質、側腦室、深層灰質、額外腦脊髓液、小腦和腦幹時。<lb/>為了解決這些困難，本研究提出了一種新穎的深度學習模型，該模型結合了 ResNet-34 編碼器和輕量級解碼器，利用多層感知器 (MLP) 模塊進行自適應特徵細化。<lb/>這一設計特別增強了模型保持解剖邊界的能力，並減少了由運動伪影和強度不均勻性引起的分割錯誤。<lb/>通過減少參數數量、使用雙線性上採樣而不是轉置卷積，以及優化解碼器以提高速度而不犧牲準確性，實現了計算效率。<lb/>在 FeTA 2021 數據集上進行 5 倍交叉驗證的訓練和驗證後，所提出的模型在基準架構如 UNet、UNet++、DeepLabV3 和 DeepLabV3+ 上表現優異，達到平均準確率 97.37%，平均 Dice 相似係數 (DSC) 90.33%，平均交集聯合 (IoU) 86.93%，以及精確率 90.83%。<lb/>此外，其快速推斷時間和減少的計算負擔使其非常適合集成到實時臨床工作流程中。
2606.01293.author: Ashiqur Rahman et.al.
2606.01293.authors: Ashiqur Rahman, Muhammad E. H. Chowdhury, Md. Abu Sayed, Md. Sharjis Ibne Wadud, Abu Naser Md. Arafat, Mehedi Hasan Prince
